name: Grilled Chicken Breast
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a heavy skillet over low heat.
2. Add the butter to coat the bottom of the pan.
3. Cook the chicken breasts for about 5 minutes per side until opaque and cooked through.
4. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. In another pan or bowl, sauté vegetables (such as bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms), pine nuts, and olives in olive oil until lightly browned.
6. If desired, add sliced hard salami or artichoke hearts to the mixture.
7. Toss the vegetables and chicken together with a dressing made by blending minced garlic, anchovies, dried herbs de Provence, lemon juice, extra olive oil, and vinegar. Season with salt and pepper as needed.
Note: The original recipe seems to have some inconsistencies and missing steps related to grilling the chicken. This rewritten version focuses on cooking the chicken breasts first and then preparing a side dish of sautéed vegetables before serving everything together.
